name: Spider Solitaire
author: Poki
description: Spider Solitaire is a classic card game where the objective is to remove all cards from all ten columns. Create a single-column chain that starts from King and goes all the way down to Ace. There are three difficulty settings: How quickly can you finish all three modes? How to play: Use your cursor to drag cards around. Select / Drag - Left Mouse Button About the creator: Spider Solitaire is created by CodeThisLab.
